LanguageData.VAE_CasualWear.description: 製作具有方便功能的休閒服裝，適合任何生活情況。
LanguageData.VAE_CasualWear.label: 休閒裝
LanguageData.VAE_FormalWear.label: 正裝
LanguageData.VAE_MilitaryClothing.description: 製作防風雨服裝來保護你的士兵。
LanguageData.VAE_MilitaryClothing.label: 軍裝
LanguageData.VAE_SterileAttire.description: 製作醫生和科學家使用的無菌服裝。
LanguageData.VAE_SterileAttire.label: 無菌服
LanguageData.VAE_WorkAttire.description: 為任何類型的工作製作舒適且實用的服裝。
LanguageData.VAE_WorkAttire.label: 工作服
LanguageData.VAE_HazardProtection.description: Develop suits resistant to high toxicity and radiation.
LanguageData.VAE_HazardProtection.label: 危險防護
LanguageData.VAE_LeatherTanning.description: 了解鞣製過程，以製作更厚實、更耐用的盔甲。
LanguageData.VAE_LeatherTanning.label: leather tanning
LanguageData.VAE_MlitaryCamouflage.description: Craft special military apparel allowing users to resemble the background environment such as foliage.
LanguageData.VAE_MlitaryCamouflage.label: 軍用迷彩
